testcase.name: testDeleteCommentPage

failure.message: Model attribute 'message' Expected: a string containing "Your comment has been deleted" but: was "It was not possible to delete your comment"

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Model attribute 'message' Expected: a string containing "Your comment has been deleted" but: was "It was not possible to delete your comment" at testcase.name: testWriteCommentPage

failure.message: Model attribute 'message' Expected: a string containing "Your comment has been saved" but: was "It was not possible to save your comment"

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Model attribute 'message' Expected: a string containing "Your comment has been saved" but: was "It was not possible to save your comment" at testcase.name: testReadCommentPage

failure.message: Model attribute 'message' Expected: a string containing "Please insert a comment" but: was "There isn't a comment for this user"

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Model attribute 'message' Expected: a string containing "Please insert a comment" but: was "There isn't a comment for this user" at
